title: Xtra Roasted Slovakian Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty lacto-vegetarian stew featuring roasted vegetables and a hint of grapefruit juice, cooked to perfection in a clay cataplana pot. This traditional Slovakian dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the carrots, potatoes, zucchini, red bell pepper, and onion with a little bit of oil and season with salt and pepper.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a large baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
While the vegetables are roasting, heat a little bit of oil in the cataplana pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the roasted vegetables, grapefruit juice, and vegetable broth to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until heated through.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
